title:
Frequently Asked
Questions
supportTitle: Need Help With Your Trip Plan?
supportDescription:
Have a question about a feature?
Need ideas for your group itinerary?
Our team responds quickly and helps you get the most out of WePlanify for your next group adventure.

Because user experience is our priority.

items.question: Is WePlanify free?
items.answer: Yes, WePlanify is currently free for beta testers. We plan to introduce premium plans with advanced features in the future, but the core functionality will always remain free.

items.question: Can everyone participate in trip planning?
items.answer: Absolutely! Every participant can suggest ideas, vote on activities, track the budget, and view the itinerary in real-time. No account required for guests.

items.question: How do I create an account?
items.answer: Simply click 'Get Started' and sign up with your email or Google account. It takes less than 30 seconds to create your first trip.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes, we take security seriously. Your data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your personal information with third parties.

items.question: Can I use WePlanify on mobile?
items.answer: Yes! WePlanify works on any device — desktop, tablet, or smartphone. Access your trips anywhere with our responsive web app.

items.question: How can I contact support?
items.answer: You can reach us via our contact page or email us at support@weplanify.com. We typically respond within 24 hours.

items.question: How do I invite friends to my trip?
items.answer: Share your unique trip link with friends via email, WhatsApp, or any messaging app. They can join instantly without creating an account.
